violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Particle board shelving in dry storage has unsealed edges and wear exposing bare wood surfaces.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Condensation issue with ductwork in dry storage room. Ceiling tile removed and bucket placed on shelving to collect leaking. Replace water stained/damaged ceiling tiles.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
